title: aster argillarius
intro: Aster argillarius, also known as prairie aster or prairie star, is a perennial plant native to North America that grows in dry prairies and open woods. The plant's roots and flowers possess medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aster argillarius include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of Aster argillarius typically involve making teas, tinctures, or infusions from the plant's roots and flowers, which can be used to promote digestive health and calm the nervous system.
